docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY ZHANG, YIN AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, YIN AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-13-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR 2 MONTHS, AND THEN EVERY SUBSEQUENT 2 MOS. UNTIL JUNE 2016, FOR A TOTAL $10,143.00 HAS BEEN PAID, WHICHEVER COMES FIRST. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,143.00 ON SEPTEMBER 25, 2015. DEFENDANT FURTHER AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,000 ON THE 25TH DAY OF EACH SUCCESIVE MONTH UNTIL THE ENTIRE $10,143.00 HAS BEEN PAID", PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID FLEISIG. FILING FEES AND COSTS OF SERVING POS ARE IN THE SUM OF $143.00 WHICH IN INCLUDED IN THE FIRST PAYMENT.PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $776.61 AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, YIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA $9,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 INTEREST, $143.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,143.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $68.00) SERVED JUL-30-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $812.61 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $514.10 ACCRUED INTEREST, $60.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, YIN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID FLEISIG. FILED BY ZHANG, YIN UALESI, FAASOA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, YIN AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA
